metadata.title: Bon Appétit RDC — Your Complete Kitchen
metadata.description: Bon Appétit is a complete family food brand accompanying Congolese families at every daily meal.
metadata.keywords: bon appétit, food, kitchen, family, DRC, Congo, sauces, milk, canned goods, pasta, makayabu

hero.title: YOUR COMPLETE KITCHEN
hero.subtitle: A wide range of food products to accompany every daily meal.

products.title: All Our Products
products.subtitle: A complete food range for every moment in your kitchen

phares.title: Our Iconic Products
phares.subtitle: The products that make Bon Appétit proud

items.name: Bon Appétit Milk
items.desc: A rich and creamy powdered milk, formulated for the whole Congolese family. Available in 400g, 900g and 1.8kg formats.

items.name: Bon Appétit Mayonnaise
items.desc: Smooth, tasty and creamy. The ideal mayonnaise to elevate your homemade recipes.

items.name: Bon Appétit Ketchup
items.desc: A delicious tomato ketchup, perfect to accompany fries, burgers and all your cravings.

items.name: Bon Appétit Makayabu
items.desc: The iconic salted fish of Congolese cuisine, prepared according to local traditions.

categories.title: A Complete Range
categories.subtitle: Each category designed to enrich your cooking

values.title: What Guides Us
values.subtitle: The pillars that define the Bon Appétit brand

items.title: Quality
items.desc: Products made to the highest standards for your table.

items.title: Flavor
items.desc: Authentic tastes that make the whole family smile at every meal.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: A reliable brand present in Congolese households for years.

items.title: Availability
items.desc: Our products accessible everywhere across the national territory.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: We constantly innovate to enrich your daily food experience.

about.title: A Congolese Family Brand
about.text: Bon Appétit accompanies African families with a wide range of food products designed to enrich every daily meal.
